displayName: Node throughput demo (C8 REST ↔ Nano Falcon)
summary: Async producer flood + JobWorker on @nanobpm/nano-sdk (a drop-in for @camunda8/orchestration-cluster-api). One code path runs against Camunda 8 (REST) or Nano (Falcon) — the SDK upgrades transparently. Streams live creates/s and completes/s.
